# Portfolio Project Template

Fill in the fields below and paste this into the working session to save the project to the database.
Leave a field blank or write `null` if it doesn't apply.

---

## Core Info

**title:**
**short_description:** *(max 500 chars — shown on cards and listings)*

**description:** *(supports Markdown — full detail, shown on project detail page)*
```
[write description here]
```

**project_date:** *(YYYY-MM-DD)*
**status:** *(completed | in_progress | on_hold)*
**category:** *(exact category name, e.g. Web App, Mobile, API)*
**tags:** *(comma-separated, e.g. Laravel, React, MySQL)*

---

## Links

**project_url:** *(live demo or product URL)*
**github_url:**
**client_name:** *(leave blank for personal projects)*

---

## Display

**is_featured:** *(true | false)*
**is_published:** *(true | false)*
**sort_order:** *(integer, lower = appears first, default 0)*
**color_primary:** *(hex, e.g. #41EAD4 — used for project accent colour)*
**color_secondary:** *(hex, e.g. #FF6B35)*

---

## Technologies

*(One per line)*
```
Laravel
Vue.js
MySQL
```

---

## Metrics

**primary_metric_value:** *(e.g. 10k+, 99%, $50k — the big headline number)*
**primary_metric_label:** *(e.g. Users, Uptime, Revenue Generated)*

Additional metrics *(name: value pairs, one per line)*:
```
Active Users: 10,000+
Uptime: 99.9%
Load Time: <1s
```

---

## Case Study

**role:** *(your role on the project, e.g. Lead Developer, Full-Stack Engineer)*
**duration:** *(e.g. 3 months, 6 weeks)*

**challenge:** *(what problem were you solving?)*
```
[write here]
```

**solution:** *(how did you approach it?)*
```
[write here]
```

**results:** *(what was the outcome?)*
```
[write here]
```

---

## Images

**featured_image:** *(upload manually via admin portal)*
**gallery images:** *(upload manually via admin portal after creation)*
